EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The connection of the user {datafield3} from host {src.host} is terminated due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is terminated due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
The connection of the remote user {datafield3} with the local username {object.account.name} from host {src.host} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is terminated due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
The connection of the user {datafield3} from host {src.host} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is terminated due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
A connection from host {src.host} is terminated due to the rule "{event_src.rule}"
